organisation.name: Test-Bed Environment – System Administrator Lab
organisation.naics_label: Computer Systems Design and Related Services
critical_business_functions: Ubuntu server hardening and configuration testing
regulatory_frameworks: Internal security policy / ad-hoc research governance
organisation.name: Apex Retail Solutions
critical_business_functions: Order fulfilment and last-mile delivery coordination

priority_asset_classes: Microsoft Entra ID / Active Directory identity plane
risk_profile.threat_notes: Primary threats are retail-sector specific: POS malware (FIN7, Magecart), credential stuffing against customer portal, phishing targeting Microsoft 365 staff accounts, and ESXi ransomware targeting virtualisation layer. Supply chain risk via CI/CD pipeline is medium priority given Azure DevOps footprint.

endpoint.edr_recommendation: Wazuh (open source) or Microsoft Defender for Linux
endpoint.patch_management: Manual – apt update/upgrade on Ubuntu; Windows Update on Windows 11 host
Monthly cadence with emergency out-of-band patching for internet-facing services

virtualisation.guest_os: Windows Server and Ubuntu mixed workloads
virtualisation.snapshot_policy: Snapshots before release changes; retained for 14 days

identity.mfa_recommendation: TOTP via Google Authenticator or similar for SSH access
identity.password_policy: Basic – /etc/security/pwquality.conf on Ubuntu; Windows 11 local policy defaults
Minimum 14 characters with blocked common passwords
identity.passwordless_recommendation: Deploy FIDO2 passkeys for high-privilege accounts

network.network_monitoring_recommendation: tcpdump or Zeek for test-bed traffic analysis
network.dns_security: Default ISP DNS; no dedicated DNS security layer
network.network_segmentation_notes: VirtualBox NAT/Host-Only adapters isolate VM. No VLAN segmentation.
network.dns_security: Filtered recursive DNS through managed security policy
network.network_segmentation_notes: POS VLAN isolated from corporate and e-commerce segments. Site-to-site VPN between branch locations and Azure.

critical_assets.name: POS Terminals (Windows 11 Pro)
critical_assets.notes: Card present payment processing. PCI DSS in scope. Primary target for memory-scraping POS malware.

critical_assets.name: E-Commerce Platform (Ubuntu 22.04 / Nginx / PostgreSQL)
critical_assets.notes: Internet-facing. Handles customer authentication and card-not-present transactions. Credential stuffing and web skimming risk.

critical_assets.name: VMware ESXi Hypervisor
critical_assets.notes: Hosts store server workloads. ESXi ransomware campaigns are an active threat sector-wide.

critical_assets.name: Microsoft Entra ID / Active Directory
critical_assets.notes: Compromise grants lateral movement across Azure services and on-premises stores. BEC and token theft are primary attack vectors.

critical_assets.name: Azure SQL Database
critical_assets.notes: Contains cardholder data and customer PII. SQL injection and data exfiltration risk.

critical_assets.name: Fortinet FortiGate
critical_assets.notes: SSL-VPN CVEs have been actively exploited for initial access in retail sector incidents.

attack_surface.third_party_notes: Salesforce, Microsoft 365, payment gateway integrations. Supply chain risk via Azure DevOps and GitHub Actions pipelines.
attack_surface.api_exposure_notes: E-commerce storefront exposes REST APIs. AKS-hosted microservices with Azure API Management.

security_controls.zero_trust_notes: Conditional Access policies in place via Entra ID. VLAN segmentation for POS. Full ZT maturity not yet achieved.
security_controls.backup_notes: Azure Backup for VMs. VMware snapshots retained 14 days. Immutable backup copies for ransomware recovery.
security_controls.incident_response_notes: IR runbook aligned to NIST CSF. Co-managed SOC with 8-person team. ServiceNow for ticketing.
security_controls.mttd: Target <4 hours via Microsoft Sentinel alerts

data_classification.classification_recommendation: 3-tier scheme: Public / Internal / Confidential applied to scripts, configs, and documentation.
data_classification.encryption_at_rest_recommendation: Enable LUKS full-disk encryption on Ubuntu VM disk.
data_classification.encryption_at_rest_notes: Azure SQL Transparent Data Encryption. Azure Blob Storage encryption. Windows BitLocker on endpoints.
data_classification.encryption_in_transit_notes: TLS 1.2+ enforced for all web and API endpoints. IPsec for site-to-site VPN.

operational_context.uptime_requirements: 24/7 for e-commerce platform. Store hours (06:00–22:00 local) for POS.
operational_context.rto: 4 hours for e-commerce; 1 hour for POS
operational_context.rpo: 15 minutes for transaction databases; 4 hours for non-critical systems
operational_context.peak_hours: 11:00–20:00 local time, weekends and holiday season
operational_context.high_risk_periods: Black Friday / holiday shopping season; post-hours batch payment processing windows

governance.change_management: ServiceNow change management. Emergency change process for critical patches.
governance.audit_requirements: Annual PCI DSS QSA assessment. Quarterly internal vulnerability scan. Annual penetration test.

recommended_improvements: Deploy FIDO2 phishing-resistant MFA for all privileged accounts
Enable Microsoft Sentinel UEBA and Entra ID Identity Protection alerts
Apply VMware ESXi patches and disable OpenSLP to mitigate ESXiArgs-style ransomware
Implement WAF rules and bot detection for e-commerce customer login portal
Enforce PCI DSS network segmentation audit across all store VLANs
Pin and sign CI/CD pipeline dependencies; integrate SBOM scanning into Azure DevOps
Deploy Entra ID Conditional Access with device compliance requirements for all staff
Enable Azure Defender for SQL on cardholder data databases
Conduct tabletop exercise simulating POS malware and ransomware scenarios
Expand Tenable Nessus coverage to include cloud asset scanning via Azure connector
